title: Warning in large integers module attributes
body:
For the following module:
```
(* x= 10000000000000000000 *)
module a();
endmodule
```
iverilog produces the warning
```
warning: verinum::as_long() truncated 65 bits to 63, returns 776627963145224192
```

This seems to have no other impact on my simulation (I am not using this attribute elsewhere, it is used by other tools). I would therefore not be annoyed by a WONTFIX answer.

Interstingly, the following snippet doesn't produce any warning:
```
module a();
(* x= 1000000000000000000000 *) wire x;
endmodule
```

iverilog version: git 4a8f4d65d0a3
